title: Alloy Notebooks
description: Settings for Alloy Notebooks — multi-language notebook extension with SQL, charting, and cross-language data sharing.

defaultLanguage.title: Default cell language
defaultLanguage.description: Default language for new cells (python, sql, r)

autoLoadExtension.title: Auto-load kernel extension
autoLoadExtension.description: Automatically load Alloy kernel magic when a notebook opens

showLanguageIcons.title: Show language icons on cells
showLanguageIcons.description: Display a small language icon (Python, SQL, R, Markdown) on the left margin of each cell
